events.title: Cloud Foundations Bootcamp
events.summary: A hands-on day covering core cloud concepts and your first deployment.
events.description: Start from zero and leave with a deployed project. This full-day bootcamp walks through compute, storage, and networking fundamentals, followed by a guided lab where every participant ships a small app to the cloud. Laptops and a GitHub account are all you need — the Student Builder Group team handles the rest, from setup to troubleshooting.
